_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in migrating workloads to, from, and among the different cloud computing service models.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of cloud platform services for data and AI workloads across major providers, including compute, storage, managed database, analytics, and machine learning services, and the trade-offs between cloud-native and cloud-agnostic approaches.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-007 (TF, cosine: 0.588), AI-K-015 (AI, cosine: 0.550).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.544). Shared vocabulary: [cloud, workloads]. DCWF-only terms [among, computing, different, migrating, models, service] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, agnostic, ai, analytics, approaches, compute] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.860, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 31-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Skill in migrating workloads to, from, and among the different cloud computing s" and "Knowledge of cloud platform services for data and AI workloads across major prov" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.597 > STS 0.544 (gap +0.053). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [cloud, workloads] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [cloud, workloads]. DCWF-only: [among, computing, different, migrating, models, service]. WIDAI-only: [across, agnostic, ai, analytics, approaches, compute].
